published_prior_art.cite: ManskiTamer2002IntervalData and BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2011ConvexMoment give generic interval/convex-support partial-ID machinery
Song2024GeneralBunching, Dong2015RoundingRD, BarrecaLindoWaddell2016HeapingRD, and BoschDekkerStrohmaier2020Window are adjacent but do not give a deterministic heap-null phase frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_multivariate_interval_regression_v1 is adjacent endpoint-pruning warning, not this bunching-local endpoint frontier

published_prior_art.cite: BertanhaMcCallumPayneSeegert2022Stata and ManskiTamer2002IntervalData do not state endpoint-cell dominance for deterministic heaping

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The handoff table calls ManskiTamer2002IntervalData and BeresteanuMolchanovMolinari2011ConvexMoment strict tightenings, but Theorem 1 and the §4 Gap text present only a routine specialization fixing the bunching object.

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The support-interval equality needs an explicit nonempty-feasible-set condition; otherwise the infimum and supremum over Δ_K ∩ C_r(M) ∩ {p: Ap=q(P)} may be empty.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The no-straddling branch κ(A,B)=0 is too strong for the excess-mass stencil: side-window components of b can still vary within heaped side cells unless a row-span or within-cell-constant condition is added.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The endpoint operator depends on λ_j(p), but the endpoint-pruning rule does not specify this function or include it in the locked primitives, so 𝔄_E(P) is not fully pinned.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Downgrade the Manski-Tamer and BMM comparator-table entries from strict_tightening to generic machinery, or add a result that is genuinely phrased as a strict tightening over their interval/convex-support bounds.
Patch Conjecture 1 by replacing the κ=0 no-aliasing branch with a row-span condition for the full stencil b, or require b to be heap-cell-constant on side cells outside the raw bunching count.
Make endpoint pruning mathematically pinned by declaring λ_j as a fixed observable rule, then restate endpoint dominance and Exhibit 9.2 for that exact rule.

recommended_next_step: Revise the comparator promise and the three statement-level well-posedness patches; the novelty kernel survives.
